groups.titleZh: BC PCP 模拟考试（1000题中随机50题）
groups.descriptionEn: BC-focused PCP written exam prep bank for 2027-era candidates. Each start draws a random 50-question exam from a 1000-question case-based bank built around safe PCP-level judgment, reassessment, prioritization, and CPCF-era thinking.
groups.descriptionZh: 面向 2027 年考生的 BC PCP written exam 备考题库。每次开始都会从 1000 题案例式题库中随机抽 50 题，重点训练安全的 PCP 级判断、reassessment、优先级，以及更接近 CPCF 时代的考试思路。

questions.questionEn: A 2-year-old patient is found with snoring respirations after being difficult to arouse. Which finding most strongly suggests that airway protection is worsening?
questions.questionZh: 一名 2 岁病人被发现有打鼾样呼吸，且难以唤醒。哪项发现最提示气道保护正在恶化？

options.zh: 能体现灌注、通气或反应性恶化，而不是表面细节的发现
options.en: A finding that shows worsening perfusion, ventilation, or responsiveness rather than a superficial detail

options.zh: 即使风险在变化，也低估沟通、记录或现场因素
options.en: Undervalue communication, documentation, or scene factors even when risk is changing

options.zh: 选择听起来最高级、但不一定最安全的 PCP 答案
options.en: Choose the most advanced-sounding option even if it is not the safest PCP answer

options.zh: 因为某一个征象看起来安心就假设病人稳定
options.en: Assume the patient is stable because one sign looks reassuring

questions.explanationEn: This item is now framed for BC PCP written-exam prep for a 2027 candidate. The correct answer is the safest PCP-level choice because it responds to the main threat, respects patient trend, and fits the kind of clinical judgment, prioritization, reassessment, and patient-safety thinking that matters for BC-focused entry-to-practice preparation.
questions.explanationZh: 这题现在按 BC PCP 2027 考生的 written exam 备考方向来写。正确答案之所以正确，是因为它代表最安全的 PCP 级选择：能回应主要威胁、尊重病人趋势，并符合 BC 取向 entry-to-practice 备考里最重要的临床判断、优先级、reassessment 和 patient safety 思路。

questions.questionEn: A 4-year-old patient is short of breath, speaking in only 2-3 word phrases, and using accessory muscles. Which finding most strongly suggests that the patient may be tiring and losing reserve?
questions.questionZh: 一名 4 岁病人呼吸困难，只能说 2-3 个词，并使用辅助呼吸肌。哪项发现最提示病人可能正在疲劳并失去代偿余地？

options.zh: 能体现灌注、通气或反应性恶化，而不是表面细节的发现
options.en: A finding that shows worsening perfusion, ventilation, or responsiveness rather than a superficial detail

options.zh: 等到诊断完全确定后再行动
options.en: Delay action until the diagnosis is fully certain

options.zh: 选择听起来最高级、但不一定最安全的 PCP 答案
options.en: Choose the most advanced-sounding option even if it is not the safest PCP answer

options.zh: 等到情况变得戏剧化之后，才把它当成紧急问题
options.en: Wait for the picture to become dramatic before treating it as urgent

questions.questionEn: A 19-year-old patient is in a high-speed crash with little visible injury but a concerning mechanism. Which finding most strongly suggests that occult injury may be more important than the visible wound?

options.zh: 先处理主要即时威胁，再处理次要细节
options.en: Address the major immediate threat before secondary details

options.zh: 即使风险在变化，也低估沟通、记录或现场因素

options.zh: 一旦形成初步印象就跳过 reassessment

questions.questionEn: In a case where a 8-year-old patient is light-headed with cool skin and an increasingly weak radial pulse, which choice best protects patient safety?
questions.questionZh: 在一名 8 岁病人头晕、皮肤发凉，桡动脉越来越弱的病例中，哪个选择最能保护病人安全？

options.zh: 一旦形成初步印象就跳过 reassessment
options.en: Skip reassessment once an initial impression has been formed

options.zh: 等到诊断完全确定后再行动
options.en: Delay action until the diagnosis is fully certain

options.zh: 既保护安全又避免不必要拖延的 PCP 级动作
options.en: A PCP-level action that protects safety without unnecessary delay

options.zh: 选择听起来最高级、但不一定最安全的 PCP 答案
options.en: Choose the most advanced-sounding option even if it is not the safest PCP answer

questions.questionEn: For a 13-year-old patient who is still speaking but now pale with weaker pulses and delayed capillary refill, which clue best separates the more dangerous presentation from the less dangerous one?
questions.questionZh: 对于一名 13 岁、仍能讲话，但面色苍白、脉搏变弱、毛细血管再充盈延迟的病人，哪条线索最能区分更危险与较不危险的表现？

options.zh: 先处理较不紧急的细节，而不是主要威胁
options.en: Focus on a less urgent detail before addressing the main threat

options.zh: 等到情况变得戏剧化之后，才把它当成紧急问题
options.en: Wait for the picture to become dramatic before treating it as urgent

options.zh: 即使风险在变化，也低估沟通、记录或现场因素
options.en: Undervalue communication, documentation, or scene factors even when risk is changing

options.zh: 应把 PCP 推向更危险解读的线索
options.en: The clue that should shift the PCP toward the more dangerous interpretation

options.zh: 即使风险在变化，也低估沟通、记录或现场因素
options.en: Undervalue communication, documentation, or scene factors even when risk is changing

options.zh: 避开花哨选项，选择最安全的 PCP 级反应
options.en: Avoid the flashy option and select the safest PCP-level response

options.zh: 等到情况变得戏剧化之后，才把它当成紧急问题
options.en: Wait for the picture to become dramatic before treating it as urgent

options.zh: 一旦形成初步印象就跳过 reassessment
options.en: Skip reassessment once an initial impression has been formed

questions.explanationEn: This item is now framed for BC PCP written-exam prep for a 2027 candidate. The correct answer is the safest PCP-level choice because it responds to the main threat, respects patient trend, and fits the kind of clinical judgment, prioritization, reassessment, and patient-safety thinking that matters for BC-focused entry-to-practice preparation.

questions.questionEn: A 13-year-old patient is still speaking but now pale with weaker pulses and delayed capillary refill. Which trend over the next few minutes should concern the PCP most?

options.en: Choose the most advanced-sounding option even if it is not the safest PCP answer

options.zh: 先处理较不紧急的细节，而不是主要威胁
options.en: Focus on a less urgent detail before addressing the main threat

options.zh: 一旦形成初步印象就跳过 reassessment

options.zh: 符合 entry-to-practice 安全 care 期望的选择

questions.questionEn: A PCP is assessing a 13-year-old patient who is showing subtle but progressive signs of poorer perfusion. What is the best immediate priority?
questions.questionZh: PCP 正在评估一名 13 岁、出现 subtle 但持续进展的灌注变差迹象的病人。当前最好的立即优先处理是什么？

options.zh: 先处理主要即时威胁，再处理次要细节
options.en: Address the major immediate threat before secondary details

options.zh: 即使风险在变化，也低估沟通、记录或现场因素
options.en: Undervalue communication, documentation, or scene factors even when risk is changing

options.zh: 等到诊断完全确定后再行动
options.en: Delay action until the diagnosis is fully certain

options.zh: 选择听起来厉害的答案，而不是最安全的答案
options.en: Pick the answer that sounds impressive instead of the one that is safest

questions.questionEn: In a case where a 34-year-old patient is a pediatric patient who is tiring and no longer interacting normally, which choice best protects patient safety?

options.en: The choice that reduces immediate patient risk while preserving reassessment

options.zh: 选择听起来最高级、但不一定最安全的 PCP 答案
options.en: Choose the most advanced-sounding option even if it is not the safest PCP answer

options.zh: 等到情况变得戏剧化之后，才把它当成紧急问题
options.en: Wait for the picture to become dramatic before treating it as urgent

options.zh: 因为某一个征象看起来安心就假设病人稳定
options.en: Assume the patient is stable because one sign looks reassuring

options.zh: 先处理较不紧急的细节，而不是主要威胁
options.en: Focus on a less urgent detail before addressing the main threat

options.zh: 选择听起来厉害的答案，而不是最安全的答案
options.en: Pick the answer that sounds impressive instead of the one that is safest

options.zh: 等到情况变得戏剧化之后，才把它当成紧急问题
options.en: Wait for the picture to become dramatic before treating it as urgent

options.zh: 最佳选项是最符合安全下一步思维的那个
options.en: The best option is the one most consistent with safe next-step thinking

questions.explanationEn: This item is now framed for BC PCP written-exam prep for a 2027 candidate. options.en: Choose the most advanced-sounding option even if it is not the safest PCP answer

options.zh: 最佳选项是最符合安全下一步思维的那个

questions.questionEn: For a 8-year-old patient who is near-syncope with poor colour and poor tolerance of movement, which clue best separates the more dangerous presentation from the less dangerous one?
questions.questionZh: 对于一名 8 岁、接近晕厥，脸色差，且不耐受移动的病人，哪条线索最能区分更危险与较不危险的表现？

options.zh: 等到诊断完全确定后再行动
options.en: Delay action until the diagnosis is fully certain

options.zh: 临床意义比夸张但次要细节更大的发现
options.en: The finding that matters clinically more than a dramatic but less important detail

options.zh: 因为某一个征象看起来安心就假设病人稳定
options.en: Assume the patient is stable because one sign looks reassuring

options.zh: 一旦形成初步印象就跳过 reassessment
options.en: Skip reassessment once an initial impression has been formed

options.zh: 即使风险在变化，也低估沟通、记录或现场因素
options.en: Undervalue communication, documentation, or scene factors even when risk is changing

options.zh: 等到情况变得戏剧化之后，才把它当成紧急问题
options.en: Wait for the picture to become dramatic before treating it as urgent

options.zh: 任何应迫使 PCP 重排优先级并升级处理的变化
options.en: Any change that should force the PCP to reprioritize and escalate

questions.questionEn: A 19-year-old patient is with significant mechanism and only limited external findings. Which finding most strongly suggests that limited visible injury can be misleading?
questions.questionZh: 一名 19 岁病人受伤机制明显，但外表伤不多。哪项发现最提示外表伤少可能具有误导性？

options.zh: 能体现灌注、通气或反应性恶化，而不是表面细节的发现
options.en: A finding that shows worsening perfusion, ventilation, or responsiveness rather than a superficial detail

options.zh: 选择听起来最高级、但不一定最安全的 PCP 答案
options.en: Choose the most advanced-sounding option even if it is not the safest PCP answer

options.zh: 即使风险在变化，也低估沟通、记录或现场因素
options.en: Undervalue communication, documentation, or scene factors even when risk is changing

options.zh: 因为某一个征象看起来安心就假设病人稳定
options.en: Assume the patient is stable because one sign looks reassuring

options.en: Delay action until the diagnosis is fully certain

options.zh: 等到情况变得戏剧化之后，才把它当成紧急问题
options.en: Wait for the picture to become dramatic before treating it as urgent

options.zh: 选择听起来厉害的答案，而不是最安全的答案
options.en: Pick the answer that sounds impressive instead of the one that is safest

options.zh: 任何应迫使 PCP 重排优先级并升级处理的变化
options.en: Any change that should force the PCP to reprioritize and escalate

questions.questionEn: A 2-year-old patient is becoming less responsive with shallow respirations and weak chest rise. Which finding most strongly suggests that ventilation failure may be approaching?
questions.questionZh: 一名 2 岁病人反应变差，并出现浅呼吸和微弱胸廓起伏。哪项发现最提示可能正接近通气衰竭？

options.zh: 能体现灌注、通气或反应性恶化，而不是表面细节的发现
options.en: A finding that shows worsening perfusion, ventilation, or responsiveness rather than a superficial detail

options.zh: 等到情况变得戏剧化之后，才把它当成紧急问题
options.en: Wait for the picture to become dramatic before treating it as urgent

options.zh: 选择听起来厉害的答案，而不是最安全的答案
options.en: Pick the answer that sounds impressive instead of the one that is safest

options.zh: 选择听起来最高级、但不一定最安全的 PCP 答案
options.en: Choose the most advanced-sounding option even if it is not the safest PCP answer

questions.questionEn: A PCP is assessing a 4-year-old patient who is tachypneic with poor air movement despite still being awake. What is the best immediate priority?
questions.questionZh: PCP 正在评估一名 4 岁、呼吸急促、进气差，但仍保持清醒的病人。当前最好的立即优先处理是什么？

options.zh: 先处理主要即时威胁，再处理次要细节
options.en: Address the major immediate threat before secondary details

options.zh: 等到诊断完全确定后再行动
options.en: Delay action until the diagnosis is fully certain

options.zh: 选择听起来最高级、但不一定最安全的 PCP 答案
options.en: Choose the most advanced-sounding option even if it is not the safest PCP answer

options.zh: 即使风险在变化，也低估沟通、记录或现场因素
options.en: Undervalue communication, documentation, or scene factors even when risk is changing

questions.questionZh: 一名 13 岁病人皮肤发凉、脉搏变弱，且虚弱持续加重。哪项变化最需要重新评估并升级处理？

options.zh: 意识、灌注或呼吸努力恶化
options.en: Worsening mental status, perfusion, or breathing effort

options.zh: 等到情况变得戏剧化之后，才把它当成紧急问题
options.en: Wait for the picture to become dramatic before treating it as urgent

options.zh: 先处理较不紧急的细节，而不是主要威胁
options.en: Focus on a less urgent detail before addressing the main threat

options.zh: 因为某一个征象看起来安心就假设病人稳定
options.en: Assume the patient is stable because one sign looks reassuring

options.zh: 等到情况变得戏剧化之后，才把它当成紧急问题
options.en: Wait for the picture to become dramatic before treating it as urgent

options.zh: 等到诊断完全确定后再行动
options.en: Delay action until the diagnosis is fully certain

options.zh: 一旦形成初步印象就跳过 reassessment
options.en: Skip reassessment once an initial impression has been formed

options.zh: 选择在病人安全标准下仍站得住脚的答案
options.en: Pick the answer that remains defendable when judged by patient safety

questions.explanationEn: This item is now framed for BC PCP written-exam prep for a 2027 candidate. questions.questionEn: A PCP has limited time and incomplete certainty for a 2-year-old patient who is partially obstructed and tiring during repeated attempts to breathe. Which is the best answer?
questions.questionZh: 面对一名 2 岁、部分气道阻塞，且在反复呼吸尝试中逐渐疲劳的病人，PCP 时间有限且无法完全确定诊断。哪个是最佳答案？

options.zh: 选择听起来厉害的答案，而不是最安全的答案
options.en: Pick the answer that sounds impressive instead of the one that is safest

options.zh: 即使风险在变化，也低估沟通、记录或现场因素
options.en: Undervalue communication, documentation, or scene factors even when risk is changing

options.zh: 选择听起来最高级、但不一定最安全的 PCP 答案
options.en: Choose the most advanced-sounding option even if it is not the safest PCP answer

options.zh: 最佳选项是最符合安全下一步思维的那个
options.en: The best option is the one most consistent with safe next-step thinking

options.zh: 先处理较不紧急的细节，而不是主要威胁
options.en: Focus on a less urgent detail before addressing the main threat

options.zh: 选择听起来厉害的答案，而不是最安全的答案
options.en: Pick the answer that sounds impressive instead of the one that is safest

options.zh: 基于不稳定程度而不是外观单独判断的 PCP 级优先处理
options.en: Use PCP-level priorities based on instability, not appearance alone

options.zh: 一旦形成初步印象就跳过 reassessment
options.en: Skip reassessment once an initial impression has been formed

questions.explanationEn: This item is now framed for BC PCP written-exam prep for a 2027 candidate. The correct answer is the safest PCP-level choice because it responds to the main threat, respects patient trend, and fits the kind of clinical judgment, prioritization, reassessment, and patient-safety thinking that matters for BC-focused entry-to-practice preparation.

options.zh: 采取能回应真实威胁的最安全 PCP 级下一步
options.en: Take the safest PCP-level next step that responds to the real threat

options.zh: 选择听起来最高级、但不一定最安全的 PCP 答案
options.en: Choose the most advanced-sounding option even if it is not the safest PCP answer

options.zh: 选择听起来厉害的答案，而不是最安全的答案
options.en: Pick the answer that sounds impressive instead of the one that is safest

options.zh: 一旦形成初步印象就跳过 reassessment
options.en: Skip reassessment once an initial impression has been formed

options.zh: 即使风险在变化，也低估沟通、记录或现场因素
options.en: Undervalue communication, documentation, or scene factors even when risk is changing

options.zh: 等到诊断完全确定后再行动
options.en: Delay action until the diagnosis is fully certain

options.zh: 既保护安全又避免不必要拖延的 PCP 级动作
options.en: A PCP-level action that protects safety without unnecessary delay

options.zh: 选择听起来厉害的答案，而不是最安全的答案
options.en: Pick the answer that sounds impressive instead of the one that is safest

questions.explanationZh: 这题现在按 BC PCP 2027 考生的 written exam 备考方向来写。正确答案之所以正确，是因为它代表最安全的 PCP 级选择：能回应主要威胁、尊重病人趋势，并符合 BC 取向 entry-to-practice 备考里最重要的临床判断、优先级、reassessment 和 patient safety 思路。

questions.questionEn: A 2-year-old patient is with noisy respirations and decreasing ability to maintain their own airway. Which trend over the next few minutes should concern the PCP most?
questions.questionZh: 一名 2 岁病人有异常呼吸音，且维持自主气道能力下降。接下来几分钟里，哪种趋势最应该让 PCP 警觉？

options.zh: 等到情况变得戏剧化之后，才把它当成紧急问题
options.en: Wait for the picture to become dramatic before treating it as urgent

options.zh: 因为某一个征象看起来安心就假设病人稳定
options.en: Assume the patient is stable because one sign looks reassuring

options.zh: 选择听起来厉害的答案，而不是最安全的答案
options.en: Pick the answer that sounds impressive instead of the one that is safest

options.zh: 任何应迫使 PCP 重排优先级并升级处理的变化
options.en: Any change that should force the PCP to reprioritize and escalate

options.zh: 一旦形成初步印象就跳过 reassessment
options.en: Skip reassessment once an initial impression has been formed

options.zh: 最佳答案是安全、分清优先级且现实可行的那个
options.en: The best answer is the one that is safe, prioritized, and realistic

options.zh: 选择听起来厉害的答案，而不是最安全的答案
options.en: Pick the answer that sounds impressive instead of the one that is safest

options.zh: 先处理较不紧急的细节，而不是主要威胁
options.en: Focus on a less urgent detail before addressing the main threat

options.zh: 即使风险在变化，也低估沟通、记录或现场因素
